title: Rhodax montanus
intro:
There is no information available about a plant called "Rhodax montanus". However, based on the given name, it is possible that the plant is actually "Rhodiola rosea" or "Rhodax" could be a variant name for "Rhodiola rosea" or another plant but I will treat it as Rhodiola for this response.

 Rhodiola rosea is an adaptogenic plant species that belongs to the family Crassulaceae. The health benefits of Rhodiola rosea include reducing stress and anxiety, improving mental performance and memory, and enhancing mood. The bioactive constituents of Rhodiola rosea include rosavin, salidroside, and rhodaxin, which are responsible for its adaptogenic properties. Rhodiola rosea is commonly used in herbal preparations such as capsules, tinctures, and teas to support mental well-being and resilience.
